overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunny medieval fantasy village camp. The character moves from a covered wooden market shelter through an open area with villagers and a pond, then approaches and enters a large canvas yurt tent.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden market shelter with cooking fires

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market area beneath wooden beams and canvas roofing

notable_agents.action: woman stirring a cooking pot over an open fire

entered.detail: rustic wooden frame structure with canvas roofing providing shade
black iron cauldron over open flames with smoke rising
wooden wagon with wheels parked near the shelter edge
large white canvas tent with scalloped edges visible in the distance
steep rocky mountain face rising behind the village

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a rustic wooden market shelter where Geralt walks past a cooking fire. The large canvas yurt is visible in the distant background against rocky cliffs, while villagers stand about the shaded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village commons with central muddy pond

events.description: exits the covered wooden shelter into bright open sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the shelter into the open village area, passing by a muddy pond

entered.detail: circular muddy water feature surrounded by wooden posts
short wooden stakes marking the pond boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the shaded shelter into a sunlit open area featuring a muddy pond on the left. The large canvas yurt shifts to the left side of the frame as the character moves forward along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside path with scattered villagers

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path toward the large tent, passing villagers gathered on the grassy hillside

notable_agents.action: group of villagers dancing and celebrating near wooden scaffolding

entered.detail: rough wooden pole structure supporting canvas shade

segments.scene_description: The path continues through tall grass with the large canvas yurt now centered ahead. Villagers gather on the right near wooden scaffolding, while rocky terrain rises on the right side of the frame.

events.description: enters the large canvas yurt tent through the open entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the large tent and walking through the entrance into the interior

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing near the tent entrance

entered.detail: closed wooden storage chest beside the tent entrance
dimly lit interior space visible through the open tent flaps

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the large canvas yurt which dominates the frame, passing a wooden chest and villagers near the entrance. The character walks up wooden planks and enters the tent interior, transitioning from bright outdoor light to the shaded enclosure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded market shelter into the bright outdoors, eventually concluding inside a large canvas yurt. It begins under a rustic wooden roof where Geralt walks past a cooking fire and villagers, with the distant yurt framed against rocky cliffs. As he emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a sunlit area featuring a muddy pond and a dirt path that leads toward the yurt. The camera then follows him through tall grass and past wooden scaffolding and rocky terrain, bringing the large tent into the center of the frame. Finally, the character passes a wooden chest and enters the yurt via wooden planks, transitioning from the brilliant daylight into the shaded interior of the enclosure.
